title: Multitools
description: A Mod that adds multitools. That multitools can break every Block that can be broken with the material they are made of.
body:
A Multitool Mod for Minecraft Forge and Fabric with:

- Netherite Multitool

- Diamond Multitool

- Iron Multitool

- Stone Multitool

- Wood Multitool

 
You can also find the Projekt on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/multitool-mod
